metadata.note: US sanctions relief as a bargaining chip with Moscow. Dyad-AND gate: centroid_ids={AMERICAS-USA} + primary_target=EUROPE-RUSSIA, so generic domain nouns (waiver, sanction, relief) are cross-filtered and safe. DELIBERATELY EXCLUDES the European enforcement vocabulary -- shadow fleet, tanker, seizure, interception, boarding, crude, refinery -- which stays with russia_sanctions_regime in russia_europe_theater (1,100 events, dominated by French/UK tanker seizures and Bulgarian Lukoil supply). Pre-audit on 180d dyad corpus: sanction 218, waiver 146, relief 14 (5/5 samples = sanctions relief, no disaster-relief noise), easing 14, Lukoil 16, Rosneft 6, exemption 5, license 6. Dropped as 0-hit: carve-out, delisting, SDN, secondary sanctions, Sovcomflot, Gazprombank. German compounding means bare 'Sanktion' already catches Sanktionslockerung/Sanktionsausnahme -- no compound variants needed (rule 1).

bundle.term: Sanctioned Russian energy and finance entities (objects of relief)
